positive: A whimsical forest scene featuring stylized silhouettes of friendly woodland creatures, such as fox, bunny, and owl, intertwined with bioluminescent glowing mushrooms and delicate fairy lights. The composition should be highly detailed, balanced, and designed for central placement on apparel. The aesthetic should be clean, highly contrasting, and evocative of magical realism. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, forest green, gold accents, and glowing cyan for the light sources. Flat, graphic design style with sharp lines and strong silhouette integrity. Cinematic volumetric lighting to enhance the glow, set against a dark background. High-resolution, vector-like illustration.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, low detail, artifacts, text, logo, signature, watermark, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, out of frame, monochrome, photo, photorealistic
